full_game_features: Junior and Senior seasons — two more years of growth, rivalry, and competition
Active college recruiting — get scouted during senior season, field scholarship offers, and choose your school
Career epilogues — see where your athlete ends up after high school
Hall of Fame — track your best careers across playthroughs
Full achievement tree — 25+ achievements spanning all four seasons
Multiple save slots — run parallel careers with different builds
Expanded rivalry arcs — watch rivalries evolve over four full years
World events that reference your Junior and Senior year context
roadmap_items: Live athlete rankings — league, class, state, and national boards in a persistent competitive world
Mod support for naming schools and rivals
demo.demo_end_message: You just finished your Sophomore season. In the full game, your career is only halfway done.
